hero_subtitle: Every click is a profit promise sold on stock markets by Big Tech. Discover your price and turn it into digital sovereignty.
calc_quote: "This is the value extracted from your digital life to fund their servers."
step1_question: What do you want to do?
origin_solo_desc: Generate your keys locally, with no registration or tracking.
origin_multi_desc: Explicit registration in the UPlanet digital cooperative.
origin_zen_desc: Join the Free Currency cooperative via your Astroport relay.
explain_solo: 🔑 Anonymous / Solo – Your keys are calculated and remain on your device. No personal information is collected or transmitted.
explain_multi: 🌍 MULTIPASS UPlanet – You register explicitly in the UPlanet digital cooperative. Your email and GPS position are sent to your Astroport relay to place you on the map.
explain_zen: 🪙 ẐEN Economy – You join the Free Currency cooperative and delegate your keys to your Astroport relay to participate in the ẐEN economy in G1. ẐEN Documentation →
entropy_very_low: Too weak – very easy to guess
v1_info: Classic method – Enter an identifier and a password. They are never sent over the internet.
v2_forgeron_info:
⚒️ Ğ1 Smith Key (Duniter Web of Trust)
This key lets you join the Free Currency. UPlanet will help you find certifiers!
v2_info: Mnemonic phrase – BIP39 standard. Write it down on paper!
ph_mnemonic: abandon ability able about above absent…
hint_passphrase: Additional BIP39 password – leave empty if unsure
live_info: Free input – Type any phrase. Even characters form your identifier, odd characters your password. Derivation starts after a 2s pause.
keys_success_msg: ✅ Your keys were generated locally – They have not left your device.
label_nsec: 🔑 Private key – nsec (keep safe, do not share)
hint_nsec: Click to copy – keep it secret
label_ipns: IPNS name (CIDv1 Base36) – identity in the IPFS network
solo_ready_desc: Your keys were created locally. Copy your nsec into a Nostr extension (nos2x, Alby, Amber…) to connect to decentralized apps.
solo_tip: 💡 Tip: keep your identifier/password (or mnemonic phrase) in a safe place – they allow you to regenerate your keys at any time.
btn_nostr_help: 🧩 How to use my keys with Nostr?
hint_email: Used to contact you and link your account
hint_referrer: Email of the member who referred you. They receive a 1% bonus.
hint_gps: Your geographic area on the UPlanet map – ~0.01° precision (≈ 1 km)
forfait_satellite: 🛰️ Satellite Share – 128 GB (1/3 credited to MULTIPASS)
forfait_constellation: 🌌 Constellation Share – GPU (1/3 MULTIPASS + 2/3 Digital AMAP)
mp_title_bip39: ⛔ Registration not possible with a BIP39 key
mp_intro_multi: Complete this form to activate your UPlanet digital passport.
mp_intro_zen: By registering with the Free Currency cooperative and delegating your keys to your Astroport relay, you participate in the ẐEN economy. ẐEN Documentation →
mp_intro_bip39:
⚒️ Ğ1 Smith Key detected

This BIP39 mnemonic key is intended for the Duniter Web of Trust.
It cannot be registered as a MULTIPASS.

👉 Go back to the previous step and regenerate with
🔐 Identifier (v1) or ⌨️ Free input.
mp_result_default_desc: Your identity is now registered on the UPlanet network.
mp_result_tip:
🛡️ Your MULTIPASS is protected by UPlanet.
To migrate or revoke this MULTIPASS, scan your SSSS code with the code 0000.
footer_subtitle: Fill in your MULTIPASS or become a Shareholder to support the infrastructure and participate in governance.
footer_multipass_desc: 💾 uDRIVE 10 GB • Access to UPlanet services
footer_satellite_bonus: ✨ 1/3 credited to your MULTIPASS + 2/3 Digital AMAP
footer_constellation_desc: 🤖 GPU Module • AI Infrastructure • Voting rights
footer_constellation_bonus: ✨ 1/3 credited to your MULTIPASS + 2/3 fund the Digital AMAP
footer_astroport: Installing Astroport.ONE connects your computer to UPlanet ORIGIN.
footer_zen_invite: 7 days to meet and join the ẐEN of your region.
nostr_modal_info: Install a browser extension to manage your keys securely.
nostr_modal_li4: Save – the extension now manages your signatures
err_missing_creds: Please enter an identifier and a password
err_invalid_mnemonic: Invalid phrase (wrong checksum or wrong language)
mnemonic_invalid: ✗ Invalid phrase (wrong checksum or wrong language)
gps_unavailable: ⚠️ Geolocation not available on this device
referrer_valid: ✅ Valid referral code – they will receive the 1% bonus
referrer_invalid: ⚠️ Invalid format – use the referrer's email (e.g. alice@example.com)
reg_err_bip39: ⛔ BIP39 key incompatible — regenerate with 🔐 Identifier (v1) or ⌨️ Free input
reg_err_gps: ⚠️ Please enter your GPS position (click 📍 Locate me)
reg_err_referrer_invalid: ⚠️ Invalid referral code – use the referrer's email
reg_err_self_ref: ⚠️ You cannot be your own referrer
reg_ref_note_multi: 🤝 Referrer registered: {name} will receive the 1% bonus.
reg_zen_result: Your ẐEN Economy membership is registered. Your Astroport relay can now manage your G1 exchanges. {referrer_note}Join the Free Currency cooperative on Open Collective →
reg_multi_result: Your registration with the UPlanet cooperative is confirmed. Your MULTIPASS is activated. {referrer_note}You appear on the UPlanet map in your area.
ext_firefox: 🦊 Install nos2x-fox for Firefox to manage your keys securely
ext_chrome: 🧩 Install nos2x for Chrome/Brave to manage your keys securely
